generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO commander, I've seen firsthand how our allies are falling behind on defense spending. It's not just about the money - it's about trust and reliability. When countries don't pull their weight, it weakens our collective security. We need to hold our allies accountable and ensure they're contributing fairly. Our national security depends on it. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurity
